examples.title: Timestamp Ordering Protocol
examples.description: Ensures read/write operations follow timestamp order
examples.code:
FUNCTION process_read(T, data_item):
    IF T.timestamp < data_item.last_write_ts:
        ABORT T
    ELSE:
        UPDATE data_item.last_read_ts
        PERFORM READ
examples.explanation: Aborts transaction if trying to read outdated version
